sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_vectors (id UInt32, vector Array(Float64));
SELECT id, LinfDistance(vector, [3.0, 4.0]) AS distance FROM test_vectors;
UPDATE test_vectors SET vector = [4.0, 5.0] WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, LinfDistance(vector, [1.0, 1.0]) AS distance FROM test_vectors WHERE distance > 1;
